name: issuedepyt
title: Issue Dependencies
description: Visualize issue dependencies in a graph or tree. Issues with time information can also be visualized on a timeline.
changeNotes:
Version 1.8.0:
- Add save of settings for current user. Note! That opening full-screen from an issue automatically stores the settings to be able to load the full-screen graph with the same settings.
- Add smarter graph autosizing (contribution).
- Add graph controls auto-collapse when space insufficient (contribution).
- Redesign graph sizing into a draggable bar.
- Fix view of version bundle custom fields in issue info.
